\p2Like I said before, I'm \N[2], a mage. I'm a
lifelong citizen of beautiful Verdin Village!
\p2Now, what brings you here to Verdin Village?
We don't get visitors very often...
\p2Understandable. A lot of people end up in Verdin Village
because they have nowhere else to go. We welcome all
\p2Ah, fascinating! I've always wanted to live that
lifestyle and get to see the world at my own pace.
friends - we just met, after all!
\p2So whatever the reason, you're here now. You look like
you haven't been on The Trail for very long... do you
\p2Interesting! We had someone from Solus Town here
on diplomatic errands just a couple days ago.
Something to do with monster-related issues
in the areas around our towns...
\p2Come to think of it, he kind of looked like you.
His name was Matt, does that ring a bell?
\p2Your brother? I knew it! Unfortunately, you just
missed him - he and the Village Elder went to
\p2But hey, if you're headed down Adon, I'm
sure you'll run into them at some point!
\p2I guess this is our time to part. It was
\p2I don't know really know if we can be
friends... this is my last day in town.
\p2The occasion? Oh, nothing in particular. Just...
the start of the adventure of a lifetime!!
\p2Seeing the world has always been a dream of mine,
and there's no better time than now, especially
since I'm training to be a mage!
\p2I'm going to stop by some of the local shops before I leave.
There's Dirty Mike's Weapon Smith, Larry's Marvelous Diner,
and Matilda's Magical Warehouse. They all sell great stuff,
just what I'll need to get through Green Slime Cavern!
\p2Oh yeah... you're really not from here, are you?
\p2See, there's a rather large cave north of the village.
Green Slime Cavern, we call it, on account
of the Green Slimes that dwell within.
\p2It's not the ideal way past the mountains,
but I'm not exactly rolling in Bits
right now, so paying for a ferry is
\p2I've finally worked up the courage to fight my way through...
are you up to the challenge? You should go through as well!
Then I won't be alone... but if you're trying to keep
exploring down south, you gotta' go through.
\p2I almost forgot. You never got a
real welcome to Verdin Village, so...

I want to go adventuring, but... agh, I'm
just so anxious! And I bought this big ol'
a better fit for me, but if I go in and

\adamI've been all the way down Adon,
so I think I'll be taking a break

with his people, I was celebrating

\vilBut I've already got my own snacks...

\nunTake good care of that charm. I have

\nunHm, so you're the one that helped our
\nunI praise you for your help, thank you.
\N[2] has always been... well, a bit
unprepared for situations like these. It's
good that you were there to help him out.
\nunOh, I hope the statues didn't get damaged...
\nunWe just recently had those two statues of the First
Champions put down at the entrance of town. They're a
nice addition to the scenery, and it's always respectful
to honor the legacy of the First Champions.
\nunIt would be a shame if they ended up
more scratched than they already were
\nunSpeaking of the statues... I found this
strange gold charm laying on the base of
one of them the same day it was put down.
\nunNo one has come back to inquire about it,
and I have no use for it... I figure that
it could be of more use to you than me.
\nunTake good care of that charm. I have

\n<Flora>I know... but look how many flowers are growing here!
This is the perfect place for my flower throne!!
I need to guard them so that no evil people
come and pick them while I'm not looking...
\n<Flora>I know I shouldn't talk to strangers...
\n<Flora>Nice to meet you, \N[1]! Now that we're no
longer strangers, can you pleaaase help me?
\n<Flora>If you could pick me a \ii[3], a
double the size of my collection! It would
be like a dream come true! Please, mister!
you'll have no problem finding them!
\n<Flora>WOW WOW WOW! Thank you so so so much mister!
This means the world to me!
\n<Flora>I can't let you go empty handed...
\n<Flora>My favorite flower! It's so rare, you'll never
find my spot for them! Put it behind your ear,
it's even better than wearing a hat!
\n<Flora>If you could pick me a \ii[3], a
double the size of my collection! It would
be like a dream come true! Please, mister!
\n<Flora>If you ever lose that flower I gave
you, just come talk to me... we can
work out a cool business deal!
\n<Flora>Very well then. But it'll cost you
more than usual. 3 of each flower!
\n<Flora>Er, sorry, that was mean... I just figured
that's what all the business folk say.
Got some work to do now!
